subcodes.first_line: O thou unique pearl from the ocean of the Kingdom, may God increase thy radiance and brilliance! Verily, the glorious Lord Christ, all glory be unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الدره الفریده من بحر الملکوت زادک الله لمعانا و تلئلا ان السید الجلیل المسیح له المجد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wealth inequality and its moderation
